","2026-03-05T21:41:18.899Z","2026-03-15T12:06:49.307Z","gpt-5-1","isAgentConversation","a|c","b|T","o|d|e","n|0","d919511f-868c-47eb-91ea-c2c41c511abf","request_id","uuid","chatItemType","status","fromTimestamp","toTimestamp","seen_state","a|i|j|k|l|m|n|o","3bf3e564-2cf2-4b3c-ae8e-94164f617ce7","7f79c9e0-00d3-4925-87bf-8b2b05f8fac9","agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","success","n|VD21F5D","seen","o|p|q|r|s|t|g|u|v","exchangeUuid","timestamp","request_message","a|k|x|y|z|l|o","exchange-pointer","d074fc30-edc1-4701-a918-cd085539ed70","2026-03-05T21:47:52.227Z","Schreibe mir ein perfektes Setup für Development und Deployment in eine Markdown, ich will Angular und dotnet verwenden gepaart mit einer Restapi und Postgres DB. Die App soll dem Nutzer die Option geben, Abläufe für ihre Teams zu speichern","o|10|11|12|13|14|t|v","ee0466e7-5c54-4d8c-a520-1e25ac60dd3d","2026-03-05T21:49:04.910Z","schreib das alles in eine md file für die Anforderungen ","o|10|11|16|17|18|t|v","edf64a4b-c3e5-4047-b419-31cdacbd46e6","2026-03-05T21:50:13.659Z","schreib es bitte in eine markdown datei damit ich auch später Zugriff drauf habe","o|10|11|1A|1B|1C|t|v","631498c4-8c3c-43cf-a0bf-6b58a441fd45","2026-03-05T21:50:34.445Z","","o|10|11|1E|1F|1G|t|v","341281a8-4f91-42ef-a8ad-d35b72587d98","5c4debb1-0b16-42e3-91f7-a8ac452171fa","n|VD23aYd","o|p|1I|1J|s|t|u|1K|v","14a58a22-842c-4c4e-94b7-72f7c1c340e2","2026-03-05T21:54:28.406Z","Plane mit mir, wie man für ein Sportteam gewisse spielabläufe mit mehreren Spielern umsetzen kann, die z.B. Pässe, Bewegungen von Spielern speichert und wiedergibt auf einer 2d matrix und einer timeline, die Play/Pause und rewind etc beinhaltet","o|10|11|1M|1N|1O|t|v","5f48e66f-b9ef-421f-9b45-01f6be21aace","2026-03-05T22:05:54.647Z","Gib mir einfach eine Idee für ein modulares und erweiterbares System und schreib diese in eine Readme ","o|10|11|1Q|1R|1S|t|v","3dac7d26-6f3e-48e2-a9e3-7f85ebb49951","2026-03-05T22:06:15.472Z","o|10|11|1U|1V|1G|t|v","d96cae2e-d365-49f4-a6ac-c8a5b6549e4d","55bb4c40-0d88-47ff-83e9-3361285e0516","n|VD27Xto","o|p|1X|1Y|s|t|1K|1Z|v","39c2d372-c84e-4b6d-8949-e9181e318a71","2026-03-05T22:16:58.857Z","Lass uns mit dem Domänenmodell starten und ein Spielfeld zur Verfügung stellen. Hilf mir dabei, eine Datenbankstruktur und Dotnet enpoints zu designen für den tech stack","o|10|11|1b|1c|1d|t|v","4991b5eb-4fba-40c0-94d6-50fa5cf24e32","2026-03-05T22:20:17.722Z","ib mir erst einmal die Ordner struktur für das Projekt, die Skalierbarkeit einfach macht","o|10|11|1f|1g|1h|t|v","ba026eaa-65bb-4a9c-9a81-b5d6c3b46b51","2026-03-05T22:28:51.578Z","Muss ich für api, domain etc alles eine neue Solution anlegen?","o|10|11|1j|1k|1l|t|v","8c179f9c-cc72-4a35-9fca-0ccc06ccb3d2","2026-03-15T11:58:39.358Z","kannst du tailwind in das Projekt installieren?","o|10|11|1n|1o|1p|t|v","8037563b-e873-4cd7-8bdc-176b1f1b5526","2026-03-15T11:58:54.133Z","o|10|11|1r|1s|1G|t|v","45020c34-9b05-4611-b912-cbda6dce1cf6","2026-03-15T11:59:09.850Z","o|10|11|1u|1v|1G|t|v","2a36021b-ce66-4b3f-971c-5eb2d38e2fa2","2026-03-15T12:01:00.278Z","mach die installation mit config und scss anpassung","o|10|11|1x|1y|1z|t|v","412437b2-7af0-44bd-9433-5a7fd943464b","2026-03-15T12:01:58.643Z","o|10|11|21|22|1G|t|v","830d96a1-99af-41d2-9b9a-9b4072aa8a38","2026-03-15T12:02:27.578Z","o|10|11|24|25|1G|t|v","bee0c044-9861-4936-95c3-34ca5697d468","2026-03-15T12:02:52.324Z","o|10|11|27|28|1G|t|v","570aed36-e730-4680-bb27-f984092cc0e1","2026-03-15T12:04:52.908Z","kann ich jetzt einfach via dem inline styling die components stylen?","o|10|11|2A|2B|2C|t|v","f0f5b824-2beb-434f-b70e-348eed21480b","2026-03-15T12:06:49.311Z","wie kann ich global ein Font als Standardschriftart im Projekt definieren?","o|10|11|2E|2F|2G|t|v","a|w|15|19|1D|1H|1L|1P|1T|1W|1a|1e|1i|1m|1q|1t|1w|20|23|26|29|2D|2H","rich_text_json_repr","a|z|2J|l","type","content","a|2L|2M","doc","a|2L","paragraph","o|2P|2Q","a|2R","o|2N|2O|2S","draft","o|2K|1G|2T|2U","o|X|E|Y|Z|a|b|D|C|C|f|g|h|A|A|2I|2V","SSR vs PWA für schlechte Verbindungen

It looks like you're trying to use `tailwindcss` directly as a PostCSS plugin. The PostCSS plugin has moved to a separate package, so to continue using Tailwind CSS with PostCSS you'll need to install `@tailwindcss/postcss` and update your PostCSS configuration.
 at Object.at [as default] (C:\Users\Finn\WebstormProjects\PlayPlanner\node_modules\tailwindcss\dist\lib.js:38:1643)
 at StylesheetPluginFactory.initPostcss (C:\Users\Finn\WebstormProjects\PlayPlanner\frontend\PlayPlanner\node_modules\@angular\build\src\tools\esbuild\stylesheets\stylesheet-plugin-factory.js:173:66)

Node.js v22.16.0

Process finished with exit code 1

","o|10|11|6A|6B|6C|t|v","a|2z|33|36|39|3C|3F|3I|3L|3O|3R|3U|3X|3a|3d|3g|3j|3m|3p|3t|3w|3z|42|45|48|4B|4F|4J|4M|4P|4S|4V|4Y|4b|4e|4h|4k|4n|4q|4u|4y|52|55|58|5B|5F|5J|5N|5Q|5T|5X|5b|5e|5h|5l|5p|5s|5v|5y|62|66|69|6D","mentioned_items","a|z|2J|l|6F","o|6G|1G|2T|2U|D","o|2s|G|2t|2u|b|D|C|C|2c|g|2v|A|A|6E|6H","a|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|S|U|V|T|W","
Basic Angular Service Template Provided
","2026-03-15T15:52:57.041Z","2026-03-15T16:19:43.543Z","0a440502-2385-4247-8607-96e27beffbe4","bfdbf4cd-4829-45ac-86f6-656677c460bc","46c8375f-86f1-4d36-9384-d5f500a7ad46","n|VDx4nQO","o|p|6O|6P|s|t|g|6Q|v","829b35a1-f640-4a03-b52e-bb0c7eb42ff1","2026-03-15T15:53:22.148Z","kannst du den service ganz grundlegend bauen? ich brauche nur die standard angular notation","o|10|11|6S|6T|6U|t|v","f0cbefe6-2ce2-406e-859c-ceb8eb542c7c","2026-03-15T15:59:29.998Z","was könnte der Service noch brauchen? er soll das Feld, was eine svg sein wird, befüllen mit Objekten, wie Spielern und Hindernissen aus einer Vogelperspektive","o|10|11|6W|6X|6Y|t|v","d5e3bff7-7692-457b-b1bc-e014c6d6763f","2026-03-15T16:03:47.550Z","soll man lieber für den "Level editor" einen anderen service machen oder ist das hier auch in Ordnung? im bezug auf AddPlayer etc","o|10|11|6a|6b|6c|t|v","fd00bbc9-2933-4d39-b6e9-8f0c188c94f4","2026-03-15T16:06:37.011Z","soll ich das fieldobject type lieber nullable properties geben oder lieber für Sachen wie Spieler und Hindernisse verschiedene Typen anlegen?","o|10|11|6e|6f|6g|t|v","c2468a76-9c36-4bde-a145-e19b2e095ede","2026-03-15T16:13:12.547Z","sollte man hier im Service auch Felder wie Current Field deklarieren oder ist das falsch?","o|10|11|6i|6j|6k|t|v","523025de-1568-439f-82cd-273ed40222a6","2026-03-15T16:19:43.546Z","wie würdest du den currentField Type skizzieren?Ich brauche auf jeden Fall die Svg datei später dazu und die Spieler sollen sich auf diesem feld bewegen, dazu wird eine Art Timeline/ keyframes genutzt","o|10|11|6m|6n|6o|t|v","a|6R|6V|6Z|6d|6h|6l|6p","o|6J|9|6K|6L|6M|b|D|C|C|2c|6N|A|6q|A|2V","o|H|2W|2r|6I|6r","shown","workspaceQuestions","a|6t|6u","o|6v|C|D","o|8|9|A|B|C|D|6s|6w|A"],"6x"]
